vertical_datum: MLLW (as delivered by NOAA NCEI San Diego Bay P020 DEM)
source_dataset: NOAA NCEI - NOS Estuarine Bathymetry - San Diego Bay (P020), 2017
source_citation: National Centers for Environmental Information, 2017. NOAA NOS Estuarine Bathymetry - San Diego Bay (P020). NOAA NCEI. doi:10.7289/V5JD4V3D
notes: wet_mask/land_mask/nodata_mask are mutually exclusive and collectively exhaustive.
depth_m is defined (finite) only where wet_mask is True.

open_u_face.npy/open_v_face.npy mark the arbitrary interior/edge faces (not a single named grid edge) where real charted water borders the hand-traced open-ocean region defined by entrance_line_lonlat / coronado_line_lonlat; every other exterior face is a solid wall.

The open boundary uses each open face's own real, charted depth (no assumed/synthetic depth or bathymetry) — see docs/LIMITATIONS.md for how entrance_line_lonlat and coronado_line_lonlat were determined (hand-traced against the DEM footprint and a real satellite map, after automated heuristics repeatedly misplaced the boundary; the bathymetry-only DEM has no land data at all past the charted coastline).
Resampled with block-average (rasterio Resampling.average), not stride sampling.
